name: 运动/健身广告

prompt_template.subject: {product_description}
prompt_template.athlete: athletic model in dynamic pose with product
prompt_template.props: sports equipment as visual anchor, exaggerated scale
prompt_template.background: minimal dark studio with reflective floor

defaults.typography: bold condensed font, brand color accent
defaults.lighting: spotlight from above, dramatic body highlights

overrides.athlete: no model, product floating at dynamic angle
overrides.props: motion lines and speed effects around product

overrides.athlete: athlete mid-action wearing product, stadium lights, lens flare

overrides.layout: three vertical panels: close-up detail + action shot + product hero, unified bottom strip with branding

overrides.athlete: muscular athlete seated on oversized dumbbell or equipment

category_tips.running_shoes: dynamic forward motion, speed lines, track or road surface context
category_tips.basketball: mid-dunk or crossover pose, stadium lighting, court texture
category_tips.fitness_equipment: athlete using product, sweat detail, gym environment
category_tips.sportswear: compression fit visible, fabric technology highlighted, movement pose
category_tips.protein_supplements: product with athlete post-workout, muscular definition, energy mood
category_tips.sports_drink: splash effects, condensation, vibrant energy colors, hydration theme

examples: Sports advertising photo. {product} placed diagonally on reflective dark surface. Dramatic side lighting, speed lines around product. Bold headline text. Dynamic and energetic, 8K, 1080x1350px
Fitness brand campaign. Athletic model wearing {product}, seated on large dumbbell. Dark studio with reflective floor. Spotlight from above. 'STRENGTH' bold headline. Nike campaign quality, 8K
